message:
refactor(search): remove frankensearch-migration feature flag and legacy code

Post-cutover cleanup (bd-3un.36.4): frankensearch is now the sole search
backend. Remove dual-path feature gates, legacy FNV-1a hash embedder
implementation, and legacy wide-crate SIMD dot product.

- Cargo.toml: make frankensearch-embed/index non-optional, drop feature
- hash_embedder.rs: remove FNV constants, fnv1a_hash, l2_normalize,
  embed_tokens_legacy, and legacy test (-75 lines)
- vector_index.rs: remove legacy dot_product_f16_simd (-48 lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
